title: zornia decussata
intro: Zornia decussata, also known as Cross vine or Crossvine, is a perennial flowering plant native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties, which help to loosen and clear mucus from the lungs. The health benefits of Zornia decussata include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating coughs, colds, and other respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
